articles.title: Assassin's Creed Co-Creator Re-Reveals 1666 Amsterdam, 30-Minute Demo Playable Now
articles.description: 1666 Amsterdam, a historical action adventure, is back with a 30-minute demo at Summer Game Fest, revealed by co-creator Patrice Désilets.
articles.impact: 1666 Amsterdam's return excites fans of the genre.

articles.title: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Leaves Early Access and Launches Across PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X and S in September
articles.description: RuneScape: Dragonwilds officially launches on September 15, 2026, across PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X and S, adding to a busy gaming month.
articles.impact: Dragonwilds adds to September's gaming excitement.

articles.title: Control Resonant Preview - Hands-On With Remedy’s Surreal Take On Stylish Action
articles.description: Control Resonant offers a fresh melee-focused action experience, diverging from its predecessor's shooter mechanics, as previewed by Game Informer.
articles.impact: Control Resonant reinvents the franchise's gameplay.

articles.title: Nintendo Switch 2: One Year Later
articles.description: Celebrating one year since its release, the Nintendo Switch 2 features enhanced hardware, a larger screen, and new Joy-Con controllers, improving the gaming experience.
articles.impact: Switch 2 continues to enhance gaming experiences.

articles.title: Leak Reveals Microsoft Wants Its AI To Be ‘Addictive,’ CEO Satya Nadella Feigns Astonishment
articles.description: Microsoft's new AI assistant, Scout, reportedly aims for addictiveness, as revealed in a leaked internal document, surprising even CEO Satya Nadella.
articles.impact: Microsoft's AI strategy raises ethical concerns.

articles.title: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition launches August 28
articles.description: Elden Ring's Tarnished Edition is set to launch for Switch 2 on August 28, alongside new downloadable content, enhancing the game's offerings.
articles.impact: Elden Ring expands its universe with new content.
